habitat: Heaths, mountains, and open woods of Europe and northern Asia.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional digestive and diuretic culinary spice; gin flavoring.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell verdauungsförderndes und harntreibendes Gewürz; Gin-Aroma.
preparation: Crushed berries in cooking and tea (short courses traditionally).
cautions: Avoid high doses and prolonged use; not for kidney disease or pregnancy without advice.
historicalNotes: Ancient European spice and ritual plant.
habitatDe: Heaths, mountains, und lichte Wälder von Europa und northern Asien.
preparationDe: Crushed berries in die Küche und Tee (short courses traditionellly).
cautionsDe: Vermeiden hohe Dosen und längere Anwendung; not für kidney disease oder Schwangerschaft ohne Beratung.
historicalNotesDe: Ancient Europaan spice und ritual plant.
